commandResults.label: V30 semantic smoke

coverage.note: 真实 PNG/GIF/contact sheet evidence exists for two named packs.
V31.11/V31.12 remain blocked because no photo-derived action frames passed full closure.
Weak transform-only candidate is rejected; semantic candidate passes.
Settings/gallery/photo wizard/diagnostics paths render with mocked Tauri data.
This report intentionally avoids visible window/focus-stealing automation.

codeReviewFindings.finding: V31/V32 evidence still does not implement arbitrary-cat photo-to-action closure.
codeReviewFindings.evidence: V31 continuation smoke reports v31_11/v31_12 blocked; V32 PRD explicitly scopes to named local project-authored packs.

codeReviewFindings.finding: Headless settings-page screenshots use mocked Tauri data and cannot prove native overlay or real bridge behavior.
codeReviewFindings.evidence: The copied post_v30 browser UX evidence uses a mocked Tauri invoke layer and does not open visible desktop windows.

codeReviewFindings.finding: Several V32 generated evidence files are dated 2026-06-24 while this audit report is dated 2026-06-25.
codeReviewFindings.evidence: V32 smoke script currently emits its original execution date; this audit records the rerun command result separately.

browserEvidence.screenshotMode: Chrome headless only; settings path copied from post_v30_browser_ux_acceptance.mjs evidence generated in this workspace
